content.query:
-- View for SCG_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard Report v20220802
--
-- DROP VIEW dbo.SCG_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard
--

CREATE VIEW dbo.SCG_ActualSales_Consumer_Dashboard AS 
SELECT 
  'Company G' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO], 
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Ship Amount] 
FROM 
  SCG.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode 
WHERE 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) BETWEEN DATEADD(
    MM, 
    DATEDIFF(
      MM, 
      0, 
      CAST(
        GETDATE() AS Date
      )
    ), 
    0
  ) 
  AND DATEADD(
    DD, 
    -1, 
    DATEADD(
      MM, 
      DATEDIFF(
        MM, 
        0, 
        CAST(
          GETDATE() AS Date
        )
      ) + 1, 
      0
    )
  ) 
  AND OrderStatus IN ('9') 
  AND IM.ProductClass IN (
    'CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 
    'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP'
  ) 
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty >= 0
